home.title: Home
home.aboutPreviewHeading: The company that puts quality first
home.aboutPreviewDescription: We offer services in maintenance, electrical installation, and project management consulting. Built on responsiveness and strong leadership, we deliver results you can rely on.
home.serviceCardServiceDescription: Fast and reliable help when something goes wrong - around the clock
home.serviceCardElectricalDescription: New installation, renovation, and upgrading of electrical systems
home.serviceCardProjectDescription: Consultation and planning from idea to finished project
home.benefitBannerResponseDescription: We get back to you within 24h

about.title: $t(common.about)
about.heading: Meet the team
about.description: <highlight>With over 40 years of combined experience in the electrical industry,</highlight> Amperium Elektriska delivers quality at every step — both as installer and project manager. From small assignments to turnkey installations for major clients, the goal is always the same:<br/ > making the project a success.
about.note: Amperium was founded in 2023 by Jimmy Rittervall & Simon Kihl

services.title: $t(common.services)
services.heading: $t(common.ourServices)
services.description: With extensive experience in electrical work, we help both private individuals and businesses - quickly, safely, and with high quality in every job. <highlight>Explore our services below</highlight>

service.heading: Fast help when things go wrong
service.description: Got an urgent electrical fault in the middle of the night, or a system acting up and disrupting your business? We're here for you. With deep experience and broad expertise, we respond quickly and fix the problem - big or small.

electrical.heading: Electrical installation from the ground up
electrical.description: Building new, renovating, or upgrading an existing electrical system? We help you all the way - from planning and permits to installation and final inspection, always with safety and quality in focus.

project.heading: Project management consulting
project.description: Taken on a big project that needs backup on the leadership side? Or maybe you have more service requests than you can keep up with? We're here for you. With a deep well of experience, we can provide project managers for both large, complex projects and smaller ones.
